content: hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?
talk to tywin
I am unable to directly message Tywin. I can message Jaime, Tyrion, or John. Would you like me to relay a message through one of them, or would you like to proceed in a different way?
yes relay through them
Okay, I will relay the message. Which of the connected agents (Jaime, Tyrion, or John) would you like me to use to contact Tywin?
your wish
Could you please clarify which agent (Jaime, Tyrion, or John) you would like me to use to relay the message to Tywin?
jaime
Okay, please provide the message you would like me to relay to Tywin through Jaime.
hey tywin how are you

try again
